title: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu (C) arrives at the Netzarim Corridor just south of Gaza City on November 19, 2024 -- two days before the International Criminal Court issued a warrant for his arrest
text:
Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu (C) arrives at the Netzarim Corridor just south of Gaza City on November 19, 2024 -- two days before the International Criminal Court issued a warrant for his arrest
- -
- Updated
Tags
As featured on
The health ministry in Hamas-run Gaza said Friday hospitals have only two days' fuel left before they must restrict services, after the UN warned aid delivery to the war-devastated territory is being crippled.
